title: AdType
description: DRAFT v0 — the ad-type-classifier's output for ONE ad. TEXT-ONLY: derived from a perception artifact (never the image), ring 2 brand-free. Classifies the ad on established advertising theory and records the BASIS (grounds_in) so every classification is traceable to knowledge/reference/ad-taxonomy.md. message_basis = Puto & Wells (1984); execution_style = Belch & Belch / Kotler & Armstrong; ad_type = the routed seed adapter.

message_basis.description: Layer 1 — what carries the message (Puto & Wells, 1984).

execution_style.description: Layer 2 — the observable execution style (Belch & Belch; Kotler & Armstrong).

ad_type.description: The routed seed adapter (knowledge/reference/ad-taxonomy.md routing table).

grounds_in.description: REQUIRED provenance — the citation(s) into ad-taxonomy.md this classification rests on (e.g. 'Puto & Wells (1984) informational; Belch & Belch demonstration'). A classification with no basis is a defect.

reason.description: Which perception facts drove the call (text/scene/look evidence). Anti-hallucination trace.
